name: Pappardelle III (Assembly)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Cheese, Parmesan, freshly grated (or more)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the warm duck sauce as directed in the Pappardelle I Pasta and Pappardelle II Duck recipes.
2. Cut the dough into 3 pieces.
3. Roll out one piece of dough on a lightly floured board to a thickness of 1/16 inch.
4. Starting from the end nearest you, roll the dough around and around a rolling pin until it is fully rolled up.
5. Cut the dough down the length of the rolling pin, then cut into pappardelle strips measuring approximately 1 x 5 inches.
6. Repeat steps 2-5 with the remaining two pieces of dough.
7. Place the pappardelle on a tray lined with a floured cloth and let it dry briefly in the refrigerator, uncovered.
8. Meanwhile, bring 5 quarts of water to a boil and add 1 tablespoon of salt.
9. Add the pasta gradually, stirring with a wooden spoon. Boil vigorously until just tender, about 2 to 4 minutes.
10. Drain well.
11. Return the pasta to the empty pot and add half of the sauce along with 1/4 cup Parmesan. Toss gently over medium heat.
12. Serve immediately on heated plates, topping with the remaining sauce. Additional Parmesan and a pepper mill should be provided at the table.
